overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a rain-soaked futuristic city. The player moves through neon-lit commercial streets, covered walkways, and under elevated highways, passing various pedestrians with umbrellas and light vehicle traffic.

events.description: crossing the multi-lane street at a zebra crosswalk

agents.ego_description: walking along the rain-soaked sidewalk and crossing the street toward a covered walkway

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with red umbrella walking ahead on the crosswalk
blue sports car driving past on the wet road

entered.detail: futuristic teal phone booth with glowing advertisements
large vertical billboard displaying car advertisement with 'CALLED' text
yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing on wet asphalt
tall trees with green foliage lining the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rain-soaked cyberpunk street at night, with neon reflections on wet pavement. The player walks past a teal phone booth and large car advertisements, then crosses a multi-lane street at a zebra crossing. Sparse pedestrians with umbrellas and a passing blue sports car populate the scene.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway entrance with vending machines

events.description: entering the covered pedestrian walkway from the open street

agents.ego_description: walking into the sheltered walkway while passing other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with orange umbrella walking ahead under the cover

entered.detail: overhead metal and glass structure providing shelter from rain
row of futuristic purple-lit vending machines along the left wall
transparent barrier separating pedestrian walkway from street traffic

segments.scene_description: The player enters a covered pedestrian walkway, transitioning from exposed rain to sheltered dryness. Purple vending machines line the left wall while a glass barrier separates the walkway from the street. The lighting shifts to artificial as the sky becomes mostly obscured by the overhead structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: long covered walkway with commercial storefronts

agents.ego_description: proceeding steadily along the covered walkway, passing vending machines and other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with brown umbrella walking ahead in the distance

entered.detail: yellow and black striped bollards along the walkway edge

segments.scene_description: The player continues walking through the extended covered walkway, with purple vending machines recurring on the left and traffic visible through the glass barrier on the right. The elevated highway overpass becomes more prominent in the distance as the walkway stretches forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: open street approaching elevated highway overpass

events.description: exiting the covered walkway back into the open street

agents.ego_description: walking along the open sidewalk toward the massive overpass structure ahead

entered.detail: tall digital advertisement screen showing animated content

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered walkway, the scene opens up to reveal the massive elevated highway overpass looming ahead. The Softsys building with green neon signage appears on the left, while a large vertical billboard dominates the right side of the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: area beneath elevated highway with auto repair shop

events.description: entering the darker shadow area beneath the elevated highway structure

agents.ego_description: walking under the massive concrete overpass, passing through dimly lit area

notable_agents.action: couple walking together with red umbrella approaching from ahead

entered.detail: massive cylindrical concrete pillars supporting the highway above
green neon sign reading 'DIAGNOSTICS AND ECU REPAIR'
vertical red neon strips on building facade
large illuminated advertisement screen showing a woman's face

segments.scene_description: The player enters the shadowy area beneath the elevated highway, where massive concrete pillars dominate the left side. The lighting drops significantly, creating a darker atmosphere with green and red neon signs providing illumination. A couple with a red umbrella walks toward the camera from the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial corner with Brooklyn Barista and grid intersection

events.description: emerging from under the overpass into the open intersection area

agents.ego_description: turning right at the intersection while approaching the Brooklyn Barista storefront

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red jacket walking along the storefront

entered.detail: bright pink and red neon sign for 'BROOKLYN BARISTA' coffee shop
distinctive white grid pattern painted on the street crosswalk
futuristic glass-enclosed walkway or building entrance across the street

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the darkness under the overpass, the player turns right at an intersection featuring the brightly lit Brooklyn Barista coffee shop with prominent pink neon signage. The street features a distinctive white grid pattern crosswalk, and a futuristic glass-enclosed structure is visible across the street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a rain-slicked open street into the sheltered confines of a futuristic pedestrian walkway. It begins on a wet pavement reflecting vibrant neon lights, moving past a teal phone booth and large car advertisements before crossing a multi-lane street amidst sparse pedestrians and a passing blue sports car. As the camera advances, the scene transitions from the exposed rain into a covered walkway, where the open night sky is replaced by an overhead structure and the lighting shifts to a concentrated artificial glow. The movement then continues along this sheltered path, passing a series of purple vending machines while traffic remains visible through a glass barrier on the right. Finally, the perspective stretches forward as the walkway extends toward a prominent elevated highway overpass in the distance.

The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a sheltered walkway into the oppressive shadows of a highway overpass before emerging into a brightly lit commercial intersection. It begins by exiting a covered area to reveal a massive elevated highway looming ahead, flanked by the green neon signage of the Softsys building and a towering vertical billboard. As the camera moves forward, the scene shifts into the dim, atmospheric gloom beneath the overpass, where massive concrete pillars dominate the view and red and green neon lights illuminate a couple walking toward the camera under a red umbrella. The perspective then emerges from the darkness and turns right at an intersection, where the lighting transforms into a vibrant glow centered around the pink neon signage of the Brooklyn Barista. The shot finally settles on a view of a white grid-patterned crosswalk and a futuristic glass-enclosed structure across the rain-slicked street.
